/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/pdcch_type0_css_coreset_config_test.dir/pdcch/pdcch_type0_css_coreset_config_test.cpp.o -o pdcch_type0_css_coreset_config_test  ../../../lib/ran/libocudu_ran.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
